name: BaseConvo_Route to Victory
_source: s;Forrest;And so, to Oregot once more.
s;Kai;At least we're going on official business this time. Hardly ever happens.
s;Forrest;At any rate, we'll be taking our usual route to the border.|Then once we're in Oregot territory, we'll take the usual route
s;Kai;And from there, we can head north towards Orobas.|{c:e;Kai;HalfCloseEyes,NoSmile}Is what I would normally say, but{tgm}...
s;Forrest;What do you propose we do, then?
s;Kai;I say we get a bunch of alternate routes up our sleeves.|We'll be prepared for anything if there's gonna be interference from Circ's Talons.
s;Forrest;A sound idea. In that case, once we get past Ivory Pass, then--
s;Forrest;When did you have the time to map all that?!;bottom;fit
